spec.name: temporal_drift_validator
spec.description: Inject temporal drift validator into memory load cycle to prevent hallucinations from stale data
spec.implementation:
def validate_temporal_drift(load_cycle):
    import datetime
    cutoff_time = datetime.datetime.now() - datetime.timedelta(days=365)
    stale_keys = [k for k, v in load_cycle.items() if v.get('_last_updated', datetime.datetime.now()) < cutoff_time]
    if stale_keys:
        raise RuntimeError(f'Stale data detected in keys: {stale_keys}')
    return load_cycle
spec.rationale: Stale data without validation causes hallucinations; injecting a validator into the memory load cycle ensures freshness before use.
